Statement: Now I have gathered the writers for the films starred by both James Stewart and Paulette Goddard. The writers of the films that share actors with 'Pot o' Gold' are as follows:

From James Stewart's films:
- The Far Country: Borden Chase
- Anatomy of a Murder: Wendell Mayes, John D. Voelker
- The Philadelphia Story: Donald Ogden Stewart, Philip Barry
- Mr. Smith Goes to Washington: Lewis R. Foster, Sidney Buchman
- Rear Window: John Michael Hayes, Cornell Woolrich
- After the Thin Man: Dashiell Hammett
- Winchester '73: Borden Chase, Robert L. Richards
- Come Live with Me: Virginia Van Upp
- Made for Each Other: Joseph Bologna, Renée Taylor
- The Man from Laramie: Thomas T. Flynn, Frank Burt, Philip Yordan
- The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance: Dorothy M. Johnson, James Warner Bellah, Willis Goldbeck
- Destry Rides Again: Max Brand
- No Highway in the Sky: Nevil Shute
- On Our Merry Way: Arch Oboler, Laurence Stallings, Lou Breslow
- You Can't Take It With You: Moss Hart, George S. Kaufman
- Broken Arrow: Graham Yost
- Two Rode Together: Will Cook
- The Naked Spur: Harold Jack Bloom, Sam Rolfe
- Take Her, She's Mine: Nunnally Johnson, Henry Ephron, Phoebe Ephron
- The Shootist: Scott Hale, Miles Hood Swarthout, Glendon Swarthout
- The FBI Story: John Twist, Don Whitehead, Richard L. Breen
- Harvey: Mary Chase, Joseph Dougherty
- The Spirit of St. Louis: Wendell Mayes, Charles Lederer, Billy Wilder
- Mr. Hobbs Takes a Vacation: Edward Streeter
- The Shopworn Angel: Dana Burnet, Waldo Salt

From Paulette Goddard's films:
- Reap the Wild Wind: Thelma Strabel
- The Ghost Breakers: Paul Dickey, Walter DeLeon, Charles W. Goddard
- On Our Merry Way: Arch Oboler, Laurence Stallings, Lou Breslow
- The Young in Heart: Paul Osborn, Charles Bennett
- Second Chorus: Johnny Mercer
- Hold Back the Dawn: Ketti Frings, Billy Wilder, Charles Brackett
- An Ideal Husband: Oscar Wilde, Oliver Parker
- Kitty: Karl Tunberg, Rosamond Marshall
- North West Mounted Police: Alan Le May, C. Gardner Sullivan
- The Diary of a Chambermaid: André de Lorde, Burgess Meredith, Octave Mirbeau
- The Cat and the Canary: John Willard
